title: [MTR4] Kítòn Transit Adgency Pack
description: Trains from the North-east of Mūñkrani's Heart.
body:
Trains from the Kítòn Metropolotan Area!

Most Trains based on MTR Base Mod Trains, Contains Joban Client Mod PIDS for Tram and Metro.

# Urban Stock

KTA 2k Tram DMU (Regular and Rte. 508 Liveries)

KTA Metro 2003 Series

KTA Metro 2025 Series

KTA Monorail 1988

# Commuter Stock

KTA Class 52 "Universal Locomotive"

KTA Class 211 "Abond"

KTA Class 711 "Abond"

KTA C365 Coach

# Notes

Credit to the Origional Modelers of the Base Trains
